creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Hello.
I have one request for porting binutils.
Ports has already had some binutils for cross compile.
(For example: devel/cross-binutils)
I think these ports should integrate one port.
devel/cross-binutils can build for every target.
But it cannot build for default target because packing-list is not match.
Will you fix and create new one?
